title: biscutella sempervirens
intro: Biscutella sempervirens, also known as the perennial bog cudweed or rock cudweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Biscutella sempervirens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
